facts.value: A principle/vow operating separate from and below the chivalric grammar; older in origin
Will not declare love until certain, because to declare what cannot be guaranteed breaks what declaration is for
Holds throughout the year and never produces a declaration

value.claim: He recognizes that the vow itself was the wound
value.correct_statement: He never sees that the vow was the wound

facts.value: Produces costs Vee pays — the wait, the uncertainty — that he does not see
Honorable in its own logic, experienced by him as being in service of Vee from his vantage
Gives him his retrospective story/justification afterward: that he was being careful and she did not wait, reframing her as not 'the one'

negations.claim: He recognizes that the vow itself was the wound
negations.correct_statement: He never sees that the vow was the wound
